query:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.customerName,
  d.contractType,
  d.contractStartDate,
  d.arrUsd,
  d.tierAtStart,
  d.isReferral,
  d.onboardingFeePaid,
  d.createdAt
FROM deals d
WHERE d.aeId = 2
ORDER BY d.contractStartDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.customerName,
  d.contractType,
  d.contractStartDate,
  d.arrUsd,
  d.tierAtStart,
  d.isReferral,
  d.onboardingFeePaid,
  d.createdAt
FROM deals d
WHERE d.aeId = 2
ORDER BY d.contractStartDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
